themes.label: Truth
themes.summary: This chapter brings truth, faithfulness, revelation, or the trustworthiness of God into focus. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 10 verses. Commentary leans on "And the bramble said unto the trees, If in truth ye anoint me king over you, then come and pu...". Word-study detail reinforces "בֶּֽאֱמֶ֣ת: If in truth - stability; (figuratively) certainty, truth, trustworthiness".

themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "And all the men of Shechem gathered together, and all the house of Millo, and went, and made...". Word-study detail reinforces "וַיַּמְלִ֥יכוּ: and made - to reign; hence (by implication) to take counsel".
